class-package.description: Contiene metodos comunes a todas las interfaces
class-package.name: Interfaces

qry:select.name: SQL

resource.declare: <DATA TABLE="ORG18_CATEGORIAS" COLRET="oi_categoria" COLFNDPRN="oi_convenio" COLFND="c_categoria" COLVALPRN="1" COLVAL="01" />
resource.name: QRY_FINDOICHILD

qry:select.name: SQL
SQL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS.oi_calendario FROM ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS, ORG03_FERIADOS_EMP JOIN org27_cal_feriados.oi_calendario INNER ORG03_FERIADOS_EMP.oi_calendario WHERE ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS.c_calendario = \'STD\' AND ORG03_FERIADOS_EMP.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@COLVAL} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT per02.oi_personal_emp as VALUE FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as per02, ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03 JOIN per02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa WHERE per02.e_numero_legajo = {#PARAM:@LEG} AND org03.c_empresa = {#PARAM:@EMP} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT s.oi_sucursal as VALUE FROM LIQ22_BANCOS as b, LIQ22_BANCOS_SUCUR as s JOIN s.oi_banco INNER b.oi_banco WHERE b.c_banco= {#PARAM:@BAN} AND s.c_sucursal = {#PARAM:@SUC}
')/ROWS/ROW
